title: WordPress Integration - Looking For Feedback

posts.author: oren_y (Oren)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello community,

I’m developing a WordPress integration for monday.com, and I’m looking for early-access users to interview about their specific needs to make sure it meets them.

You’re welcome to either comment here with your use-case and wanted integration features, or email me at oren at immediacylabs dot com

Cheers!
Oren
